title: Chiseltool
description: A chisel tool that lets you turn blocks into their brick variants without using a stonecutter.
body:
### 🛠️ Chisel Tool – Bricks Made Easy!

Tired of using the stonecutter just to get some bricks?  
**This simple but powerful chisel** lets you transform various blocks directly into their brick variants – quick, intuitive, and without any extra crafting stations.

🔹 Supports popular block types like stone, end stone, deepslate, and more  
🔹 Works right in your hand – no GUI, no hassle  
🔹 Lightweight and easy to integrate into any modpack

Perfect for builders who love detail without the grind. 🧱
